🔫 Best Iconic Weapons & Where to Find Them

Iconic weapons are unique, legendary weapons in Cyberpunk 2077. Each has special mods and effects that make them stand out. This guide covers the best Iconic weapons, where to find them, and which builds benefit most from each.

📊 Iconic Weapons Overview

Iconic weapons are tiered from Tier 1+ to Tier 5++. Higher tiers have better stats and more mod slots. You can upgrade Iconic weapons at a workbench using crafting components.

💡 Important: Iconic weapons cannot be crafted from scratch. You must find them in the world. However, you can upgrade them once you have them.

🏆 Top 10 Iconic Weapons

1. Nue (Smart Pistol)

CategoryDetails
TypeSmart Pistol (auto-targeting)
Damage250-350 (varies by tier)
Special EffectBullets track enemies, +20% smart weapon damage
Best ForNetrunner builds, hybrid builds
LocationQuest reward from "The Heist" mission

Why It's Great: Smart weapons are essential for Netrunner builds. You can focus on hacking while the gun handles aiming. Nue is one of the first Iconic weapons you get and remains viable throughout the game.

2. Tactician (Tech Shotgun)

CategoryDetails
TypeTech Shotgun (charges through walls)
Damage800-1200 per shot (charged)
Special EffectCharges shoot through walls, +40% tech weapon damage
Best ForTech builds, burst damage
LocationFound in a locked safe during "The Heist" mission

Why It's Great: The Tactician can one-shot most enemies when fully charged. It shoots through walls, so you don't have to expose yourself. Essential for tech builds.

3. Ashura (Assault Rifle)

CategoryDetails
TypeAssault Rifle
Damage180-250 per bullet
Special EffectHigh fire rate, +25% headshot damage
Best ForReflexes builds, sustained damage
LocationDropped by Royce during "The Pickup" mission

Why It's Great: Ashura has an incredibly high fire rate and excellent accuracy. It's perfect for mid-range combat and works well with Reflexes builds that focus on headshots.

4. Guts (Power Shotgun)

CategoryDetails
TypePower Shotgun
Damage1500-2000 per shot
Special EffectHigh damage at close range, +30% close-range damage
Best ForBody builds, close-quarters combat
LocationFound in a chest during "The Pickup" mission

Why It's Great: Guts deals massive damage at close range. It's perfect for rushing enemies and clearing rooms quickly. Works best with Body builds that can tank hits.

5. Yukimura (Smart SMG)

CategoryDetails
TypeSmart SMG
Damage120-180 per bullet
Special EffectVery high fire rate, +15% smart weapon damage
Best ForNetrunner builds, close-range combat
LocationDropped by a Maelstrom boss during "The Pickup" mission

Why It's Great: Yukimura has an insane fire rate and smart targeting. It melts enemies at close range and works well with Netrunner builds that need a reliable sidearm.

6. Ba Xing Chong (Power SMG)

CategoryDetails
TypePower SMG
Damage150-220 per bullet
Special EffectHigh damage per bullet, +20% crit chance
Best ForCool builds, crit-focused builds
LocationFound in a hidden room during "The Ripperdoc" mission

Why It's Great: Ba Xing Chong has high damage per bullet and excellent crit chance. It's perfect for Cool builds that focus on crit damage and stealth.

7. Shigure (Tech Sniper Rifle)

CategoryDetails
TypeTech Sniper Rifle
Damage2000-3000 per shot (charged)
Special EffectCharges shoot through walls, +50% headshot damage
Best ForStealth builds, long-range combat
LocationDropped by Sasquatch during "The Beast in Me" quest

Why It's Great: Shigure can one-shot most enemies with a charged headshot. It shoots through walls, making it perfect for stealth builds. Essential for sniping builds.

8. Satori (Katana)

CategoryDetails
TypeKatana
Damage400-600 per slash
Special Effect+50% crit damage, +30% attack speed
Best ForMelee builds, Reflexes builds
LocationFound in a chest on the rooftop during "The Heist" mission

Why It's Great: Satori is the best melee weapon in the game. It has incredible crit damage and fast attack speed. Perfect for melee-focused builds.

9. Jyoken (Tech Sword)

CategoryDetails
TypeTech Sword
Damage350-500 per slash
Special EffectCharged attacks deal AoE damage, +25% tech weapon damage
Best ForTech melee builds, crowd control
LocationDropped by a Maelstrom boss during "The Pickup" mission

Why It's Great: Jyoken's charged attacks deal AoE damage, making it excellent for crowd control. It works well with tech melee builds that want to clear groups of enemies.

10. Cradle (Power LMG)

CategoryDetails
TypePower LMG
Damage200-280 per bullet
Special EffectHigh magazine capacity, +20% sustained damage
Best ForBody builds, sustained damage
LocationFound in a locked safe during "The Heist" mission

Why It's Great: Cradle has a massive magazine and deals consistent damage over time. It's perfect for Body builds that want to lay down suppressing fire and sustain damage in long fights.

🎯 Best Iconic Weapons by Build

BuildBest Iconic WeaponsWhy
NetrunnerNue, YukimuraSmart weapons let you focus on hacking
TechTactician, Shigure, JyokenTech weapons charge through walls
ReflexesAshura, SatoriFast attacks, headshot bonuses
BodyGuts, CradleHigh damage, sustained fire
CoolBa Xing Chong, SatoriCrit bonuses, stealth damage

💡 Iconic Weapon Tips

  • Don't sell Iconic weapons. They're unique and can't be found again if you sell them. Keep them in your stash if you're not using them.
  • Upgrade them early. Iconic weapons scale with your level, so upgrade them as soon as you have the materials.
  • Mod them properly. Iconic weapons have extra mod slots. Use them to maximize their potential.
  • Check for hidden Iconic weapons. Some Iconic weapons are in hidden locations or dropped by specific enemies. Explore thoroughly.
  • Some are quest rewards. Certain Iconic weapons are only available as quest rewards. Don't miss these quests.

🏆 Final Thoughts

Iconic weapons are what make Cyberpunk 2077's combat so satisfying. Each one has its own personality and playstyle. Find the ones that match your build and upgrade them to maximize your effectiveness.

Next step: Check out our Cyber Psycho Build Guide to see how to use Iconic weapons effectively in a complete build.
